title: ZWILLING Bread Knife, Blade length: 20 cm, Serrated blade, Special stainless steel/Plastic handle, Twin Chef,Silver/Black
features: Ideal for breakfast, dinner and BBQ: bread knife (blade length: 20 cm) with serrated edge for cutting crusty and light bread and rolls
High-quality knife finish: long-lasting sharpness, stability and flexibility thanks to ice-hardened FRIODUR blade
Comfortable and safe handling: Ergonomic and non-slip handle, Balanced weight distribution of blade and handle for no-stress cutting, Integrated finger guard
Made in Germany - Cut from special stainless steel, Sturdy plastic handle in 3-rivet design, Durable, Corrosion resistant, Hand wash recommended
Contents: 1x ZWILLING bread knife, Twin Chef, Blade length: 20 cm, Material: Special stainless steel/Plastic handle, 34916-201-0
description: From the manufacturer The optimal equipment for professional and hobby cooks Twin Chef bread knife With the right tools, cooking becomes a breeze and a joy. Whether you're buying your first high-quality knives or adding to your collection, the Twin Chef bread knife from ZWILLING ensures that you're prepared for any kitchen cutting job: the classic, serrated blade is incredibly versatile. Both crusty and firmer baked bread, baguettes or rolls can be cut just as effortlessly as airy, loosely baked types of bread, making this knife ideal for breakfast, dinner or an enjoyable barbecue evening. In addition, the Twin Chef knife stands out due to its excellent quality with a punched blade and ergonomic, robust plastic handle with built-in finger guard. The modern three-rivet design makes this elegant bread knife an essential part of your kitchen. Top quality and elegant design ZWILLING has upheld high-quality products in the kitchen and beauty sector since 1731. Thanks to our traditional values, creative vision and innovative techniques, we offer you a diverse range of products that are characterised by the highest quality, functionality and an elegant, timeless design. At a glance: Bread knife with a 20 cm blade Precisely punched steel Ergonomic plastic handles High performance and precision Stable and flexible due to ice-hardened blade Modern three-rivet design Made in Germany: Long-lasting, corrosion-resistant High-quality special steel Top quality begins with quality material. This is why our knife steel is manufactured to the highest standards. The ZWILLING special alloy is characterised by an optimum ratio between carbon (hardness) and chrome (corrosion resistance). In combination with the manufacturing process, the composition results in a robust and extremely durable knife that is stable, corrosion-resistant and flexible. Thanks to a heat treatment optimally matched to the steel, this steel achieves between 55 and 58 Rockwell. Innovative technique The right material hardness is important: If the steel is too soft, the sharpness of the blade quickly diminishes. If it is too hard the steel breaks. With our innovative FRIODUR blades the steel goes through 4 steps of heat treatment. The last step, ice hardening, improves hardness, wear behaviour and corrosion resistance. In the final process, tension is removed from the material, resulting in high flexibility and safety in use and preventing blade breakage. Modern design The distinctive three-rivet design of our Twin Chef knife series features a flat knife tang, on which the handle structure is firmly mounted. The rivets connect the two elements together, making the knife a durable kitchen tool. Tips for long-lasting sharpness Even a good knife should always be cared for to ensure its sharpness. Therefore only use flexible cutting boards such as bamboo and plastic. A sharpening rod sharpens dull blades. To do this, pull the blade along the sharpening steel at a 15° angle in a slight arc and repeat the process on each side depending on the desired sharpness. High-quality special steel Innovative technique Modern design Tips for long-lasting sharpness Bread knife Knife set, 3 pcs. Knife sharpener Knife block, 7 pcs. Knife block, 7 pcs.
